jobs.description: At Bessemer, we believe the future is built by creators, curators, community leaders, and co-owners. As commerce and communities transform on and off line, new distribution channels are emerging and our world is changing how we all connect, shop, and play. jobs.description: Cybersecurity is finally taking its rightful place at the center stage of the global business and geopolitical landscape. jobs.description: We care about and support founders as people — not just CEOs or business leaders. Because building a successful company requires more than performance at work.
